title: PixInsight JavaScript Runtime (PJSR) API Schema
description: API schema for PJSR scripting in PixInsight 1.9.4+ (V8 runtime, ECMAScript 2025) with legacy SpiderMonkey 24 support

v8.description: V8-based JavaScript runtime introduced in PixInsight 1.9.4 Lockhart. Supports modern ECMAScript including classes, private fields, async/await, and WebAssembly-backed FMath.

sm.description: Legacy SpiderMonkey 24 engine. Default for backward compatibility but scheduled for removal in a future PixInsight 1.9 Lockhart release. Not available on macOS ARM64.

console.description: Console output interface for script debugging and logging

isGlobalTarget.description: True if executing on global context

isViewTarget.description: True if executing on a view

targetView.description: The target view if isViewTarget is true

jsAutoGC.description: Global flag to enable/disable automatic garbage collection (SpiderMonkey only)
jsAutoGC.replacedBy: V8 manages garbage collection autonomously; use Image.free() / Bitmap.clear() for explicit deallocation

gc.description: Force garbage collection. Has no effect under V8 (which manages GC autonomously).

Image.description: Core class representing a 2D image with multiple channels

constructors.signature: Image(width: Number, height: Number, numberOfChannels?: Number, colorSpace?: Number, bitsPerSample?: Number)
constructors.description: Creates an image with specified dimensions
Creates a copy of an existing image

isColor.description: True if image is in color space

rangeClippingEnabled.description: Enable range clipping on pixel operations

sample.signature: sample(x: Number, y: Number, channel?: Number): Number

setSample.signature: setSample(value: Number, x: Number, y: Number, channel?: Number)

crop.signature: crop(left: Number, top: Number, right: Number, bottom: Number)

cropBy.signature: cropBy(left: Number, top: Number, right: Number, bottom: Number)

rotate.description: Rotate image by angle in radians

free.description: Explicitly deallocate underlying pixel buffer. Recommended in V8 (no automatic gc()).

ImageWindow.description: High-level interface to a PixInsight image window

constructors.signature: ImageWindow(width: Number, height: Number, numberOfChannels?: Number, bitsPerSample?: Number, floatSample?: Boolean, color?: Boolean, id?: String)

activeWindow.description: Get the currently active image window

windows.description: Array of all open image windows

mainView.description: The main view of this window

isNull.description: True if window reference is null

hasMaskReferences.description: Is used as mask by other windows

saveAs.signature: saveAs(filePath: String, queryOptions?: Boolean, allowMessages?: Boolean, strict?: Boolean)

isMaskOf.description: Check if this is a mask of window

setViewport.signature: setViewport(x: Number, y: Number, zoom?: Number)

View.description: Interface to an image view (main view or preview)

ProcessInstance.description: Interface to execute PixInsight processes programmatically

canExecuteOn.description: Check if can execute on view

Dialog.description: Modal dialog window for user interaction

Control.description: Base class for all UI controls

onMousePress.signature: onMousePress(x: Number, y: Number, button: Number, modifiers: Number)

onMouseRelease.signature: onMouseRelease(x: Number, y: Number, button: Number, modifiers: Number)

onMouseMove.signature: onMouseMove(x: Number, y: Number, modifiers: Number)

onMouseWheel.signature: onMouseWheel(x: Number, y: Number, delta: Number, modifiers: Number)

onPaint.signature: onPaint(x0: Number, y0: Number, x1: Number, y1: Number)

onResize.signature: onResize(newWidth: Number, newHeight: Number, oldWidth: Number, oldHeight: Number)

add.signature: add(item: Control|Sizer, stretch?: Number, align?: Number)

insert.signature: insert(index: Number, item: Control|Sizer, stretch?: Number)

constructors.signature: FileFormat(extension: String, read: Boolean, write: Boolean)

create.signature: create(path: String, hints?: String, count?: Number): Boolean

constructors.signature: Matrix(rows: Number, cols: Number, initValue?: Number)

Point.description: 2D point with integer or floating-point coordinates

constructors.signature: Rect(x0: Number, y0: Number, x1: Number, y1: Number)

Bitmap.description: In-memory bitmap image for graphics operations

constructors.signature: Bitmap(width: Number, height: Number, format?: Number)

setPixel.signature: setPixel(x: Number, y: Number, color: Number)

drawLine.signature: drawLine(x0: Number, y0: Number, x1: Number, y1: Number)

drawRect.signature: drawRect(x: Number, y: Number, width: Number, height: Number)

fillRect.signature: fillRect(x: Number, y: Number, width: Number, height: Number, brush?: Brush)

strokeRect.signature: strokeRect(x: Number, y: Number, width: Number, height: Number, pen?: Pen)

drawCircle.signature: drawCircle(cx: Number, cy: Number, radius: Number)

drawEllipse.signature: drawEllipse(x: Number, y: Number, rx: Number, ry: Number)

drawText.signature: drawText(x: Number, y: Number, text: String)

drawTextRect.signature: drawTextRect(x: Number, y: Number, width: Number, height: Number, text: String, align?: Number)

drawBitmap.signature: drawBitmap(x: Number, y: Number, bitmap: Bitmap)

drawScaledBitmap.signature: drawScaledBitmap(x: Number, y: Number, width: Number, height: Number, bitmap: Bitmap)

ByteArray.description: Array of bytes for binary data

Timer.description: Timer for periodic or single-shot events

FMath.description: Fast Math alternative implemented with WebAssembly ahead-of-time compilation. Provides all standard Math functions plus PJSR extensions, typically an order of magnitude faster than Math.* in heavy-computation loops.

Stat.description: Statistical calculations. Replaces deprecated Math.* statistical extensions with a properly namespaced interface.

ImageIterator.description: Direct, near-native-speed access to image pixel data using V8 typed arrays backed by the image's pixel buffer. Replaces Image.forEachSample/forEachPixel.

constructors.description: Create iterator over a single channel of an image

toReal.description: Convert a raw sample to a Number in [0,1] using the image's native range

toSample.description: Convert a [0,1] real to the image's native sample type

ImageIterator.notes: Access pixels with array subscripts: iter[y][x] returns the raw sample value. For integer images, use toReal()/toSample() to bridge between [0,1] semantics and the integer storage range.

StarDetector.description: Star detection engine implemented in core C++ for high performance. Promoted from JavaScript implementation in pjsr/StarDetector.jsh. Returns an array of StarData objects from stars(image).

constructors.description: Create a detector with default parameters

applyHotPixelFilterToDetectionImage.description: Apply hot pixel filter to detection image

fitPSF.description: Fit an elliptical Gaussian to each detected source for sub-pixel position accuracy

stars.description: Detect stars in the given image

StarData.description: Result record for a single detected star from StarDetector.stars().

PSF.description: Point spread function fitting via Levenberg-Marquardt. Fully multithreaded native C++ implementation. Used by SpectrophotometricColorCalibration, LocalNormalization, and astrometry tools.

fitStars.signature: PSF.fitStars(image: Image, stars: Array<StarData>, psfFunction?: Number): Array<PSFData>
fitStars.description: Fit PSF models to detected stars. psfFunction is one of PSFunction.* (Auto, Gaussian, Moffat, MoffatA, Moffat8, Moffat6, Moffat4, Moffat25, Moffat15, Lorentzian).

PSFData.description: Result record for a single fitted point spread function.

BRQuadTree.description: Bucket-region quadtree for 2D spatial partitioning. Used in image analysis and matching algorithms. Replaces pjsr/BRQuadTree.jsh.

constructors.description: Create a quadtree spanning the given bounds

insert.description: Insert a point with associated data

search.description: Find all points within a rectangle

XMLDocument.description: XML document. Provides parsing and serialization of XML, including in-place inspection of XISF headers.

addNode.description: Add a top-level node (comment, declaration, etc.)

parse.description: Parse an XML document from a string

serializeToFile.description: Write the XML document to a file

constructors.signature: XMLDeclaration(version: String, encoding?: String, standalone?: Boolean)

XMLElement.description: XML element. Supports fluent attribute and child-node construction.

constructors.description: Create an element with the given tag name

System.description: Non-instantiable. Host machine and operating system information.

physicalMemoryStatus.description: Returns {totalBytes, availableBytes} BigInt fields describing physical memory

CoreApplication.description: Non-instantiable. Information about the PixInsight core application. Replaces many deprecated Global.* extensions.

ensureMinimumVersion.description: Throw if the running PixInsight version is older than the required minimum. Call this near the top of every script.

Runtime.description: Non-instantiable. Information about the active JavaScript runtime.

VectorGraphics.description: Graphics with floating-point coordinates. Removed in the V8 runtime: the standard Graphics class now handles all coordinate types.

ImageStatistics.description: Image statistics object. Removed in V8: equivalent functionality is now on Image directly.

insertPage.signature: insertPage(index: Number, page: Control, title: String)

v8ConstantClasses.description: Under V8, flat *_NAME constants are deprecated in favor of static class properties. The classes below contain the V8 forms; existing flat constants remain documented but emit deprecation warnings on V8.

members: A through Z, F1-F12, Space, Enter, Escape, ...

lintRules.message: __base__ inheritance is broken under V8 (it does not error, but inheritance silently does nothing). Use a JavaScript class with `extends` and `super()`.
Process constants are static properties of the class itself, not on .prototype. Remove '.prototype' from the access (e.g. `StarAlignment.OutputMatrix` not `StarAlignment.prototype.OutputMatrix`).
Assigning `Foo.prototype = new Base` is a SpiderMonkey-only inheritance trick. Use `class Foo extends Base { ... }` under V8.
gc() is deprecated in V8 and has no effect. Use Image.free() and Bitmap.clear() for explicit memory management of large native buffers.
jsGarbageCollect() is deprecated in V8. V8 manages GC autonomously; call Image.free() / Bitmap.clear() instead.
VectorGraphics is not available in V8. Use the Graphics class — it handles floating-point coordinates natively.
ImageStatistics is removed in V8. Use Image.median(), Image.MAD(), Image.stdDev(), Image.rangeClippingEnabled, etc.
Image.forEachSample/forEachPixel and their mutable variants are removed in V8. Use the new ImageIterator class for near-native-speed pixel access.
Control.showAlias()/hideAlias() are removed in V8. Layout updates are handled automatically — delete these calls.
PJSR header files (#include <pjsr/...>) are deprecated under V8. Constants are available directly as static class properties (e.g. StdIcon.Warning instead of StdIcon_Warning). Remove the #include.
Flat *_CONSTANT names are deprecated under V8. Use the corresponding static class property (e.g. StdIcon.Warning instead of StdIcon_Warning).
Math.* statistical extensions are deprecated under V8. Use Stat.* (Stat.median, Stat.MAD, Stat.stdDev, ...) or FMath.mtf for midtones.
Heavy Math.* usage inside a tight loop runs much faster as FMath.* under V8 (WebAssembly-backed, near-native speed).
V8 scripts should call CoreApplication.ensureMinimumVersion(1, 9, 4) near the top of the script to fail fast on older PixInsight versions.

No #engine directive present — this script will run on the legacy SpiderMonkey engine (default). Consider adding `#engine v8` near the top to opt into the modern V8 runtime introduced in PixInsight 1.9.4.

#engine.description: Select the JavaScript runtime engine. Must be the first directive in a script's main file. Values: v8, v8-new, v8-default, v8-private, sm. Default (if omitted) is sm.

imageProcessingV8.description: Image processing under V8 using ImageIterator and explicit memory management

starDetectionV8.description: Star detection and PSF fitting under V8
